testcase.classname: To Validate and verify the login Functionallity of the faceBook Application
testcase.name: Login-Valid To validate the login Functionallity with Invalid Credentials

failure.message:
The expression evaluated to a falsy value:
assert.ok(title.includes("facebook"))

testcase.system-out: Given The user should be in faceBook Page...................................passed When The user has to fill the userName "ramesh@gmail.com" and Password "1234567"..passed And The user has to click the login button..................................passed Then The user should navigate the invalid Page..............................failed

testcase.classname: To Validate and verify the login Functionallity of the faceBook Application
testcase.name: Login Invalid To validate the login Functionallity with Invalid Credentials

failure.message:
The expression evaluated to a falsy value:
assert.ok(title.includes("facebook"))

testcase.system-out: Given The user should be in faceBook Page...................................passed When The user has to fill the userName "mano@gmail.com" and Password "523452"..passed And The user has to click the login button..................................passed Then The user should navigate the invalid Page..............................failed
